query:
-- Check the join session for duo partner info
SELECT id, email, step, userId, membershipType, signerName, 
       duoPartnerName, duoPartnerEmail, duoPartnerMobile,
       createdAt, updatedAt
FROM join_sessions
WHERE email = 'astmeridian@outlook.com' OR userId = 9486760
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;

-- Check Abu Sufyan's CRM profile and team linkage
SELECT acp.id, acp.userId, acp.membershipTier, acp.agentStatus, 
       acp.personalEmail, acp.teamId
FROM agent_crm_profiles acp
WHERE acp.userId = 9486760;

-- Check if there's a team linked to Abu Sufyan
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.createdAt,
       m1.userId AS member1UserId, m1.personalEmail AS member1Email,
       m2.userId AS member2UserId, m2.personalEmail AS member2Email
FROM agent_teams t
JOIN agent_crm_profiles m1 ON m1.teamId = t.id
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles m2 ON m2.teamId = t.id AND m2.userId != 9486760
WHERE m1.userId = 9486760;
